name: @godaddy-x/wallet-api-js
description: Wallet API SDK for Node.js: OPS and MPC WebSocket integration.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test test/client.test.ts test/log-watch.test.ts test/trade-hook.test.ts test/app-login-sign.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --import tsx --test integration/connect.test.ts
scripts.test:btc-wallet-address: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/run-btc-wallet-address.mts
